description: Bootstrap managed-worktree-system repository and move the initial design document into it
Write an implementation specification for managed-worktree-system based on deeper review of existing systems
Implement initial managed-worktree-system CLI and core v1 commands from the implementation spec
Complete managed-worktree-system CLI to production-ready v1 by implementing real dry-run planning, lock/lease concurrency control, functional flag semantics, and publish/install delivery readiness
